files.patch:
@@ -112,0 +112,8 @@
+// We cannot use simply 'struct crlib_conf' for engine implementation;
+// in static build the symbols would mix with other implementations
+#define RENAME_CRLIB(other_class) \
+  struct crlib_conf: other_class { \
+    crlib_conf() = delete; \
+    ~crlib_conf() = delete; \
+  }
+
